      5x10 storage units are a great solution for a wide range of short-term and long-term self storage needs, including moving to a new home, storing college dorm room items, using storage while deployed, and decluttering a house or apartment.       About Our Washington, DC Location

      Located near the intersection of U St NW and 14th St NW, we serve the storage needs of Washington, DC residents. Whether you're a college student between semesters or a renter in need of more space, our 1420 U St NW storage facility offers a wide selection of storage options.

      • Located in the heart of Washington, DC (20009)

      • Our facility is also ideally located to serve Washington, DC's Northwest Quadrants (20001), including neighborhoods like Shaw, Bloomingdale, Truxton Circle, and more

      • Less than 1 mile from Howard University—college students can quickly access their belongings

      • Found 0.6 miles north of Logan Circle—conveniently located for students and young professionals needing to commute into Washington, DC's city center

      Available Storage Unit Sizes

      Storage units at our Washington, DC storage facility range in size from small 2x3 storage lockers to large 46x22 units. For your convenience, these units come with features like indoor access, first-floor access, drive-up access, and elevator access.

      Drive-Up Storage Units & Drive-In Building

      We make your storage space even more accessible with our drive-in building and drive-up access storage in Washington, DC. Pull your vehicle into our drive-in building for protection from the elements while you load and unload your items. And rent a drive-up unit so you can pull your vehicle right up next to the door of your storage space!

      Climate-Controlled Storage

      Need to store temperature-sensitive items? Climate control can help protect your belongings from extreme temperature changes. These units typically maintain a storage environment between 55 and 80 degrees throughout the year.

      Exceptional Security Features

      Our U St NW storage facility is equipped with advanced security features like video surveillance and electronic gate access. We care about the valued belongings of our customers.

      Other Amenities & Services

      • Sturdy moving carts for heavy, bulky items

      • Covered loading bay for convenient unloading and loading

      • Elevators for easy access to upper levels

      • Se Habla Espanol

      • Gate access on Sundays

      • Deliveries accepted

      • On-site office

      • Military discounts

      Cheap Self Storage in Washington, DC

      If you need an affordable self storage solution in Washington, DC, Extra Space Storage on U St NW has what you’re looking for! We offer cheap storage units with prices as low as $138 at this location. At select locations, you can also take advantage of great move-in deals like first month free and first month half-off when you reserve storage with us online!

      The Self Storage Partner You Can Trust

      We work hard to provide high-quality storage solutions at affordable rates. Our friendly, professional staff is more than happy to assist you by answering your questions or helping you find the solution for your unique needs. Contact us to reserve a storage unit in Washington, DC today!

      Directions

      Intersections/Landmarks

      Next to McDonalds. Our building is the Big White building.

      Directions from the North

      Drive south on 16th St NW. Pass the Cuban Embassy and Meridian Hill Park. Turn left onto U St NW. Our facility will be on your right, next door to District Distilling Co.

      Directions from the South

      Drive north on Raoul Wallenberg Pl SW and follow onto 15th St NW around the Washington Monument. Continue straight on 15th St NW past the White House. Turn left onto K St NW. Take the first right onto 15th St NW. Turn right onto U St NW. Our facility is on your right immediately after Waverly Pl NW.

      Directions from the East

      Drive southwest on Rhode Island Av NE. Turn right onto 9th St NW. Pass Warby Parker and turn left onto U St NW. Our facility with be immediately on the left just after 14th St NW.

      Directions from the West

      Drive southeast on Massachusetts Ave NW. Pass the United States Naval Observatory. Turn left onto S St NW. Pass the President Woodrow Wilson House and continue onto Phelps Pl NW. Turn left onto Florida Ave NW. Pass the Washington Hilton and keep right onto U St NW. Our facility will be on your right just before 14th St NW.

      Frequently Asked Questions at 1420 U St NW

      Do I need climate controlled storage in Washington D.C?

      If you’re concerned about sensitive belongings getting damaged in self storage, we recommend renting a climate-controlled storage unit at our 1420 U St NW storage facility. These units typically maintain temperatures between 55 and 80 degrees year round to help protect items from extreme temperature changes.

      What is the smallest storage unit I can rent at 1420 U ST NW?

      The most common storage unit sizes you'll find at Extra Space Storage at 1420 U St NW range from 5x5 to 10x30. Get in touch with our facility manager today to learn more about the smallest storage unit sizes we have available!

      Does the Extra Space storage facility on U St NW, Washington, DC, have 24 hour access self storage?

      Access hours vary by location. Some locations offer extended access hours, while others may have 24/7 access available. Contact Extra Space Storage at 1420 U St NW to learn more about our storage facility access hours!

      What size storage unit do I need for a 4 bedroom house at the storage facility on 1420 U St NW?

      To learn more about what Extra Space Storage unit sizes can hold, check out our handy storage unit size guide! You can also call our 1420 U St NW storage facility to get recommendations from our friendly, professional self storage experts.

      Can I store my car in self storage at 1420 U St NW in DC?

      Some Extra Space Storage facilities allow cars to be stored in large drive-up storage units. If you're looking for car storage near Washington D.C, contact the facility manager at Extra Space Storage at 1420 U St NW!

      *Promotional Terms & Conditions and Size Disclaimer

      Promotional Terms

      Limit, one promotion per customer. Promotions cannot be used in conjunction with any other offer except for web rate pricing. Promotions are subject to change and availability. Promotions may not be available in-store. Promotions do not apply to taxes, insurance, administrative fees, or other fees. Promotions must be applied at time of checkout and cannot be applied to an existing rental, once rented. See Rental Agreement for additional details.

      Half-Off and Free Rent Promotions

      Only available at participating locations for selected units. “First Month Free,” “First Month Half Off,” “Second Month Free,” “Second Month Half Off” and other rent promotions do not apply to taxes, insurance, administrative fees, or other fees and may not be combined.

      $50 Moving Truck Credit in New York City

      Only available at participating locations for selected units. Extra Space will provide a $50.00 credit for customers that use a moving truck or moving service to move into the Extra Space facility. To redeem, customers must provide a valid receipt from the moving service to the store manager. Please see the store manager for additional details.

      Size Disclaimer

      Unit sizes advertised for rent are approximate only and units at the self-storage facility may differ slightly in shape and/or size. Customers should inspect the actual unit to be rented before signing a rental agreement and should base the decision to rent on the inspection of the unit and not on the advertised unit size. Rental amounts for a particular unit are not based on square footage measurements.

      Need Help?

      Learn More About Extra Space Storage

      Extra Space Storage Inc., headquartered in Salt Lake City, Utah, owns and/or operates over 4,200 self storage properties in 42 states, and Washington, D.C. The Company's stores comprise approximately 2.5 million storage units and over 280 million square feet of rentable space, offering customers a wide selection of affordable and conveniently located and secure storage solutions across the country, including personal storage, boat storage, RV storage and business storage. We are committed to being the most convenient, secure, and professional storage solution in your neighborhood. And it is this commitment which has enabled Extra Space Storage to become the largest storage units operator in the U.S. with over 4,200 properties across the country.
